beliefs.belief: My current routines are insufficient and causing me to feel disconnected.
beliefs.evidence: I’ve been stuck in the same routines.

beliefs.belief: I experience periods of low energy and dullness when I am stagnant.
beliefs.evidence: Everything just seemed dull and flat,

beliefs.belief: I have the agency to change my mindset and actively improve my situation.
beliefs.evidence: I really want to change my mindset and approach things more positively.

beliefs.belief: Making changes involves inherent anxiety and the fear of unmet expectations.
beliefs.evidence: But what if it doesn’t live up to my expectations? 😔

downstream_scores.dominant_theme: The proactive effort to break inertia and regain vitality through new experiences.
downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Since you are planning to give it a shot, what is one small, low-stakes action you could take this week to feel that initial spark?
